title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Teacher - IIIT Hyderabad - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at IIIT Hyderabad. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Senior Teacher to strengthen our Dhanbad-based team.

About IIIT Hyderabad:
IIIT Hyderabad is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Support students with special educational needs
• Maintain student records and prepare progress reports
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Utilize technology and digital tools to enhance learning outcomes
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IIIT Hyderabad!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
